overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white cape exploring an industrial facility. The character walks through a metal corridor, opens double doors to enter a restroom area, and navigates through the space before exiting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with utility access

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the metal corridor toward the closed bulkhead doors

entered.detail: large gray metal double doors with small square windows at the top
metal grate flooring covering the corridor surface
wall-mounted stainless steel sink with faucet on the left wall
yellow and blue storage crate with red object on top sitting on the floor
gray industrial metal paneling lining both sides of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor with metal grated flooring and gray metal walls. A utility sink is visible on the left wall while a yellow equipment crate sits on the right. The character approaches a set of large bulkhead doors at the end of the hallway.

events.description: industrial bulkhead doors automatically open revealing the restroom interior with toilet stalls visible

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the opening bulkhead doors into the restroom area

entered.detail: bathroom stall with partial walls visible through the doorway
white ceramic toilet visible inside the stall
lighter colored tile flooring distinct from the corridor grates

segments.scene_description: The bulkhead doors open automatically as the character approaches, revealing a restroom interior with tiled floors and a visible toilet stall. The character passes through the doorway, leaving the corridor and equipment crate behind, and enters the new space.

scene_state.functional_zone: public restroom with wash stations and exit access

events.description: character approaches the bright exit doorway at the far end of the restroom

agents.ego_description: turning to observe the washroom sinks then proceeding toward the exit doorway

entered.detail: wall-mounted roll of toilet paper on the left wall
row of white ceramic sinks with faucets mounted on the right wall
rectangular mirrors above the sinks reflecting the room
open doorway leading to brightly lit area outside the restroom

segments.scene_description: Inside the restroom, the character turns right to reveal a row of washroom sinks with mirrors above them. The space features tiled walls and flooring. The character then moves toward a bright exit doorway at the far end of the room, passing by a toilet paper dispenser on the left wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow industrial corridor into a sterile, tiled restroom facility. It begins by trailing the character through a gray metal hallway with grated flooring, passing a utility sink and a yellow equipment crate. As the character reaches the end of the path, the scene shifts as large bulkhead doors automatically slide open to reveal a tiled interior. The camera then follows the character into the restroom, turning right to pass a row of sinks and mirrors before moving toward a bright exit doorway. The movement concludes as the character passes a toilet paper dispenser on the left wall and heads toward the light at the far end of the room.
